title: Fatcraft
description: This mod adds a variety junk foods to Minecraft!
body:
A mod that adds a variety of junk foods to the game.
- 

This mod features:
- Burgers
- Knives
- Buns
- Patties
- Sesame Plant and seeds
- Cheese Block and slices
- Yeast
- Raw French Fries
- French Fries
- Flour
- Dough
- Raw Chicken Leg
- Raw Fried Chicken
- Cooked Chicken Leg
- Fried Chicken
- Raw Sausage
- Sausage
- Hotdog Bread
- Hotdog
- Crafting recipes for each ingredient
- Advancements 

  
Cookbook - Burgers
- 
- Knives can be crafted with one stick and one iron ingot.
- If you use a knife, a bread piece, and sesame seeds, you get the top half
- If you use a knife, and a bread piece you get the bottom half
- To get patties you need a knife, and a raw beef to craft them into the patties
- To get a cheese slice, you first need a hot bucket of milk, then add yeast which you get by crafting one brown or red mushroom, and you get a cheese block. With the cheese block you can get 4 slices of cheese on the crafting table with the cheese block and a knife.
- After getting all the materials you craft them into a burger, the cheese can be skipped and only use the bun halves and the patty. Note: If you dont add cheese the side effects will be worse (Never skip the cheese!)



### This is my first mod ever and I hope you like it 😁👍🏼
